expectations.text: Total income is correctly calculated as $10,500.00 (5500 + 3200 + 1800)
expectations.evidence: Output lists three income sources totaling $10,500.00

expectations.text: Total expenses are correctly calculated (sum of all negative amounts)
Spending is broken down by category with at least 5 categories shown
expectations.evidence: 9 categories listed with individual transaction details for each

expectations.text: Net cash flow / surplus is calculated (income minus expenses)
Uses pandas for the analysis rather than manual calculation
expectations.evidence: Code shows import pandas, pd.read_csv with parse_dates, groupby, dt.to_period
